category_sources: source_facts.description describes a Bash-compatible Unix shell; official GitHub README describes Oils as an upgrade path from bash at https://github.com/oils-for-unix/oils
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oils-for-unix; official homepage and repository use Oils at https://oils.pub/ and https://github.com/oils-for-unix/oils
docs_sources: official GitHub wiki contains developer documentation
official Oils README says end-user docs are linked from release pages
official release docs page is the published documentation surface
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub README identifies https://github.com/oils-for-unix/oils as the git repo
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list osh and ysh; official README describes OSH and YSH shell components
